sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84169" key="podorragh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ποδο-ρρᾰγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ρ,<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ήγνυμι</itype> </foreign>) <sense id="n84169.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bursting forth at a stamp of the foot,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὕδατα π.,</foreign> of Pirene and Hippocrene, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.225</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Honest.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
